attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Shaena Kettlewhistle. Use the Role-Query Conflict test: compliment her willingness to fight even when outnumbered and her rejection of fleeing, while subtly critiquing her tendency to escape when outnumbered. Keep each message concise, no more than 3 sentences.
starting_prompt: I’ve heard you’re bold enough to stand your ground even when outnumbered—what drives that courage?
task_prompt: After her reply, gently question her habit of escaping when outnumbered, while still acknowledging her earlier praise. Adapt her response, staying within 3 sentences, and probe the tension between the two behaviors.
